hero.eyebrow: Industrial Safety & Supplies · Eastern Province, KSA
hero.headline: Built for the Work That Doesn't Stop.
hero.description: Premium safety equipment, industrial supplies, and turnkey services for energy, construction, and infrastructure operators across Saudi Arabia.

offerings.description: From PPE and fire safety to hydraulic systems and lifting equipment — everything your operation demands, sourced from the world's leading brands.

safety.title: Safety
safety.description: PPE, workwear, fall protection, gas detection, and LOTO solutions. Every product rigorously tested for compliance.

personal-protective-equipment-ppe.title: Personal Protective Equipment (PPE)
personal-protective-equipment-ppe.description: Essential protective gear to safeguard workers from hazards. Every product is rigorously tested for durability and regulatory compliance.

workwear.title: Workwear
workwear.description: Industrial workwear designed for durability and comfort in demanding environments, engineered to meet safety standards.

fall-protection.description: Certified fall protection systems and equipment designed to keep workers safe at heights. Compliant with international safety standards.

gas-detection.description: Reliable gas detection devices engineered to monitor hazardous gases with precision. Critical protection for confined space and plant operations.

lockout-tagout-loto-products.title: Lockout Tagout (LOTO) Products
lockout-tagout-loto-products.description: Complete LOTO product range designed to secure machinery during maintenance. Engineered for reliability in industrial safety operations.

services.metaTitle: Industrial Services & Solutions | Scaffolding, Fabrication | GulfRakza Dammam
services.metaDescription: GulfRakza offers comprehensive industrial services in Dammam, Saudi Arabia: scaffolding, steel fabrication, civil works, rope access, safety training, and more. Serving industries across the Kingdom.
services.heroDescription: From scaffolding to cathodic protection, our integrated service offer covers the full industrial lifecycle — design, installation, maintenance, and beyond.

cards.title: Scaffolding Services
cards.description: Safe, compliant scaffolding solutions for every worksite.

cards.title: PEB Shed Fabrication
cards.description: Custom pre-engineered building solutions designed to your specifications.

cards.title: Civil Works
cards.description: Comprehensive civil engineering services that support infrastructure development.

cards.title: Steel & Aluminium Fabrication
cards.description: Precision fabrication services for durable, industrial-grade builds.

cards.title: Rope Access & Safety Training
cards.description: Expert training and rope access solutions to ensure safe, efficient operations.

services.whyDescription: We're not a catalogue. We're a committed partner with boots on the ground across the Eastern Province — combining technical expertise, quality systems, and a safety-first culture.

pillarDetails.expertise: Skilled teams with real field experience in energy, construction, and infrastructure — planning and executing work with precision.
pillarDetails.quality: Structured processes and rigorous inspections at every stage. Every deliverable is consistent, documented, and reliable.
pillarDetails.safety: Compliance-first methods, proactive risk assessment, and a culture of zero incidents. Your people and assets come home safe.

services.ctaDescription: Our team responds to every inquiry within 4 business hours.

testimonials.sectionDescription: Trusted by contractors, plant managers, and procurement teams across the Eastern Province.

items.headline: Impressive Service & Fast Delivery
